name: Gypsy's Place
description:
You enter in a strange house, each wall with a diferent color.
There is a table with a crystal ball and two chairs.
You see a board with a picture of Madonna, totaly undressed.

extra_descriptions.description:
You look at the crystall ball and see...... NOTHING!!!!
What do you want?! See the future.. Hey, Give me a break!!!
Only a stupid one like you to think something like that!!!!
